originPortalInfo.title: SRI SRI SRI BALATRIPURASUNDHARI TEMPLE
originPortalInfo.description: Tripura Sundari is often represented as a girl of sixteen years age. As such she is called "sixteen" (shodashi) or "the young girl" (bala). At this stage of a woman's life, the delight aspect of her existence is most pronounced.
